version_description: Uses more detailed chords (with bass inversions) for the Chorus part.

versions.version_description: Complete version played with Capo 1 ,simple finger pluck intro and Instrumental.Nice to play with acoustic guitar.try to emphasis the added bass notes.You Tube : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s09LuDYX12g.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=
       Kool & the Gang
           Cherish
=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=

**CAPO 1st fret (all chords relative to capo)

This follows the single/radio version of the song

Some illustrated chords (FBbEbAbCf)
+ [ch]G7sus[/ch]     353533
+ [ch]F/G[/ch]       3x3211
+ [ch]A7sus[/ch]     x00030
+ [ch]G6[/ch]        320000
[tab]+ [ch]Eaug[/ch]      032110
+ Dm9       x53550 or xx0210[/tab]
+ [ch]G/A[/ch]       x00003

[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Let's take a walk together near the ocean shore[/tab]
[tab] [ch]FM7[/ch]
    Hand in hand, you and I[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Let's cherish every moment we have been given[/tab]
[tab][ch]FM7[/ch]
   For time is passing by[/tab]

[Pre Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Dm9[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]
    I often pray before I lay down by your side[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]FM7[/ch]
 If you receive your calling before I awake[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G7sus[/ch]                [ch]G7sus[/ch]
 Could I make it through the night[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Che-rish the love  we have[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G6[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]
 We should cherish the life we live (oh)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F/G[/ch]                                [ch]G/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Eaug[/ch]
 Cherish the love, cherish the life, cherish the love[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
 The world is always changing, nothing stays the same[/tab]
[tab] [ch]FM7[/ch]
    But love will stand the test of time[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
 The next life that we live in remains to be seen[/tab]
[tab] [ch]FM7[/ch]
    Will you be by my side[/tab]

[Pre Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Dm9[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]
    I often pray before I lay down by your side[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]FM7[/ch]
 And if you receive your calling before I awake[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G7sus[/ch]                [ch]G7sus[/ch]
 Could I make it through the night[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Che-rish the love  we have (mmm, yeah)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G6[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
 We should cherish the life we live (baby, yeah)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F/G[/ch]                                                [ch]G/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Eaug[/ch]
 Cherish the love (oh), cherish the life (yes I do), cherish the love (Ohh)[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Che-rish the love  we have[/tab]
                   (Let's cherish every moment we have together)
[tab] [ch]G6[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]
 For  as  long as we both shall live[/tab]
                               (Hand in hand,you and I)
[tab] [ch]F/G[/ch]                                        [ch]G/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Eaug[/ch]
 Cherish the love, cherish the life (baby), cherish the love[/tab]


[Instrumetal]
 [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]

[tab] [ch]Dm7[/ch]
    Cherish the love[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G7sus[/ch]
 Cherish the life[/tab]


[Final Chorus]
[tab] [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Che-rish the love  we have[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G6[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]
 We should cherish the life we live[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F/G[/ch]                                [ch]G/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Eaug[/ch]
 Cherish the love, cherish the life, cherish the love[/tab]

[tab] [ch]A7sus[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]A7sus[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Che - rish the love we  have[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G6[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]
 For  as  long as we both shall live (oooh)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F/G[/ch]                                                  [ch]G/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Eaug[/ch]
 Cherish the love (ohh), cherish the life (yes I do), cherish the love (ohh)[/tab]
    [Chorus]
[tab] [ch]A7sus[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]A7sus[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Che - rish the love   we have[/tab]

[tab] [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Che-rish the love  we have[/tab]
                   (Let's cherish every moment we have together)
[tab] [ch]G6[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]
 For  as  long as we both shall live[/tab]
                               (Hand in hand,you and I)
[tab] [ch]F/G[/ch]                                        [ch]G/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Eaug[/ch]
 Cherish the love, cherish the life (baby), cherish the love[/tab]


Notes:
- Dm7 can be substituted for Dm9
- The Eaug that ends each chorus can be more accurately played as E7-Eaug
- FM7 in the verses can be more accurately played as FM9


Enjoy!

++Daryl Kayanan++
  ++5.13.2021++
